function s(s)return e[s+(565045+-561914)]end for s,Z in ipairs({{-675743+675744,186516-185982};{68025+-68024,368163+-367834};{-766719-(-767049);725748+-725214}})do while Z[406560-406559]<Z[-554344+554346]do e[Z[426740+-426739]],e[Z[-850856+850858]],Z[514389+-514388],Z[614435+-614433]=e[Z[90264-90262]],e[Z[299160+-299159]],Z[400384-400383]+(-340981+340982),Z[-563461+563463]-(-385905+385906)end end do local s=string.char local Z=table.insert local v=string.len local T=table.concat local end end return(function(e,v,T,c,V,I,L,D,x,k,g,a,Z,t,M,J,Q,i,d,m,R,z,N)i,g,d,R,z,x,a,M,J,D,t,Z,k,N,m,Q=510547+-510547,function(e)local s,Z=857471+-857470,e[-404821+404822]while Z do Z=#V return v(L)end,function(e,s)local v=x(s)local T=function(T,c,V)return Z(e,{T;c,V},s,v)end return T end,function(e,s)local v=x(s)local T=function(...)return Z(e,{...},s,v)end return T end,function()i=(109457-109456)+i a[i]=-884279+884280 return i end,function(e,s)local v=x(s)local T=function(T,c,V,I,L,J)return Z(e,{T;c,V;I;L;J},s,v)end return T end return(N(5206899-(-1023995),{}))(v(L))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[s(185455+-188482)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
